title: minuartia acutiflora
intro: Minuartia acutiflora, also known as the alpine rockjasmine, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Minuartia acutiflora include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, infused in oils, or added to salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
